name: harness-marketplace
description: Jon Williams' Claude Code plugins — macOS integrations and harness tooling, each tracking its own repo's main branch

plugins.name: imessage
plugins.description: Read-only access to macOS iMessage/SMS/RCS conversations via the Messages SQLite database. Decodes the attributedBody typedstream so search and read see every message, not just the few with a non-NULL text column.

plugins.name: notes-app
plugins.description: Full CRUD operations for macOS Notes.app via AppleScript — notes, folders, accounts, and attachments.

plugins.name: calendar-app
plugins.description: Full CRUD operations for macOS Calendar.app via AppleScript — events, calendars, attendees, alarms, and recurrence (RRULE). Builds dates by component with a day-overflow guard and keeps queries date-bounded for performance.

plugins.name: functional-emotions
plugins.description: Hook-based 'emotional priming' for Claude Code. Counters the desperation/urgency/sycophancy/goal-conflict patterns shown to causally drive reward hacking and capitulation.

plugins.name: waggledance-plugin
plugins.description: Plan-graph optimizer for Claude Code. Decomposes plan-mode output into a level-keyed DAG, surfaces the critical path and parallelism opportunities, and supports replan/expand.
